untranslatable_reason: Signal requires precise thresholds for: pullback_max_penetration (in cents), stop_offset_from_htf_extreme (absolute value), minimum_pullback_size, and confirmation_bars count. These specific parameters are marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in source and cannot be inferred from text. Additionally, detecting 'failure tests' and 'lower timeframe pullbacks' requires multi-timeframe analysis not supported by single-timeframe indicators. The concept of 'small springs within range' requires pattern recognition beyond allowed operators.
translation_notes: Mapped to pivot-based range detection (s1/r1 as consolidation boundaries) with volume confirmation. Entry conditions approximate pullback into range with volume rejection. However, without the exact threshold values and explicit higher-timeframe pattern definitions, this is a structural approximation only. Recommend: (1) Define pullback_max_penetration in cents, (2) Specify HTF pattern extreme offsets, (3) Provide minimum_pullback_size threshold, (4) Set confirmation_bars requirement.
